name: @aliran/library
description: Aliran library — standalone VOD service: ingest video files into encrypted, P2P-seeded on-demand titles
comment: Requires ffmpeg + ffprobe on PATH (one-shot ingest transcode/remux). Deliberately SEPARATE from the broadcaster: a title is a static seed with no live-pipeline lifecycle (no watchdogs, no rolling window, no feed rotation), and operators must be able to run the library on different hardware than the live fleet.
